summary: A short clip that briefly opens on a film still of two men in a hallway captioned GET EM! before settling on a hand-lettered illustration on a white background. The illustration shows the text You, Lord, are a SHIELD around me. with the reference Psalm 3:3a, drawn above two outstretched arms and scattered small red hearts. A small credit line appears at the bottom.

script.scene: Brief film still of two men in a hallway captioned GET EM!
Hand-lettered graphic reading You, Lord, are a SHIELD around me, Psalm 3:3a, with outstretched arms and red hearts.

notable_text: GET EM!; You, Lord, are a SHIELD around me.; Psalm 3:3a
